🍓🍎 Sweet as summer and twice as charming. 🍎🍓

These vintage Hazel Atlas jam jars are serving up a generous helping of nostalgia. Featuring delightful strawberry and apple designs, they’re the kind of kitchen treasures that instantly transport you to family breakfasts, homemade preserves, and simpler times.

Whether you’re a collector of vintage kitchenware, a lover of mid-century charm, or just someone who believes storage should be adorable, this pair is ready for a new home.

🛍️ Available at HiraethHaven.com
🫱🏻‍🫲🏾 Make us an offer 
🍀 For those lucky enough to find it 

#hiraethhaven #hiraethhavenshop #vintage #hazelatlas #jamjar

✨ From tarnished to timeless. ✨

This vintage WM A. Rogers Paul Revere Reproduction Silverplate Footed Bowl came to us showing its age, but a little care revealed the beautiful piece hiding underneath.

Inspired by the classic Paul Revere design, this footed silverplate bowl is simple, elegant, and ready for its next chapter. Whether displayed on a shelf, filled with seasonal décor, or used as a serving piece, it’s proof that vintage treasures are always worth a second look.

🛍️ Available at HiraethHaven.com
